sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41469" key="e)pi/turon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίτῡρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen> <sense id="n41469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">confection of olives,</tr_> Lat.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">epityrum,</tr_> Cato <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">RR</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">119</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plaut.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Mil.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope> </bibl> ; commonest in Sicily, Varro <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">LL</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.86</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπίτερα.</foreign> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n41469.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιτυρά,</foreign> dub.l.in Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κάρκαρα</foreign>(=<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
